title: Engineering the future of Kubernetes for AI at scale
summary: Google Cloud proposes that Kubernetes infrastructure must evolve to support AI agents, inference workloads, and batch processing with hardware-aware elasticity. The session covers how Google's contributions to Kubernetes are enabling infrastructure fluidity, agentic workflow security, and resource optimization for AI-scale applications.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech argues that Kubernetes needs to evolve to handle AI agents, inference, and batch processing with hardware-aware elasticity. The session details Google's contributions to Kubernetes that enable infrastructure fluidity, agentic workflow security, and resource optimization for AI-scale applications. Key topics include I/O optimization, hardware reuse, local inference, and batch processing.
